committee.en: The committee will decide on the plan.
committee.zh: 委員會將決定這個計畫。

communicate.en: We communicate by email every day.
communicate.zh: 我們每天用電子郵件聯絡。

comparison.en: There is no comparison between the two.

compete.en: Many runners competed in the race.
compete.zh: 許多跑者參加了這場比賽。

complain.en: She complained about the cold soup.

concert.en: We went to a rock concert last night.
concert.zh: 我們昨晚去聽了一場搖滾演唱會。

conclusion.zh: 我們得到了相同的結論。

cone.en: She ate an ice cream cone.
cone.zh: 她吃了一個甜筒冰淇淋。

confirm.en: Please confirm your booking by email.
confirm.zh: 請用電子郵件確認你的預訂。

confuse.en: The hard question confused the students.
confuse.zh: 那道難題讓學生們困惑。

connect.en: This road connects the two towns.

conscious.en: She was conscious after the fall.

considerable.en: He spent a considerable amount of time on it.
considerable.zh: 他在這件事上花了相當多的時間。

constant.en: There was constant noise from the street.
constant.zh: 街上傳來持續不斷的噪音。

controller.en: He pressed a button on the game controller.
controller.zh: 他按下遊戲手把上的一個按鈕。

cooker.en: She cooked the rice in a rice cooker.

costly.en: Building a new house is costly.

cotton.en: This shirt is made of soft cotton.
cotton.zh: 這件襯衫是用柔軟的棉花做的。

cough.en: Cover your mouth when you cough.

countable.en: An apple is a countable noun.

county.en: They live in a quiet county in the south.
county.zh: 他們住在南部一個安靜的縣。

crab.en: We caught a crab on the beach.
crab.zh: 我們在海灘上抓到一隻螃蟹。

cradle.en: The baby slept in a wooden cradle.
cradle.zh: 寶寶睡在一個木製的搖籃裡。

crane.en: A crane lifted the heavy steel.
crane.zh: 一台起重機吊起沉重的鋼材。

crash.en: The two cars crashed at the corner.

creative.zh: 她有許多有創意的點子。

creator.en: He is the creator of this game.
creator.zh: 他是這款遊戲的創作者。

creature.en: Strange creatures live deep in the sea.
creature.zh: 深海裡住著奇怪的生物。

credit.en: She paid with a credit card.

crew.en: The ship's crew worked all night.

cricket.en: A cricket chirped in the grass.
cricket.zh: 一隻蟋蟀在草叢裡鳴叫。

crispy.en: The fried chicken was hot and crispy.

crop.en: Rice is an important crop in Asia.
crop.zh: 稻米是亞洲重要的作物。

crown.en: The king wore a golden crown.

cruel.en: It is cruel to hurt animals.

cupboard.en: The cups are in the cupboard.

dairy.en: Milk and cheese are dairy products.

dam.en: The dam holds back the river water.

dare.en: He didn't dare to jump from the wall.

dash.en: He made a dash for the bus.

database.en: All the names are stored in a database.
database.zh: 所有名字都存在資料庫裡。

dealer.en: He bought the car from a local dealer.
dealer.zh: 他向當地的經銷商買了那輛車。

decade.en: She has taught here for a decade.

deck.en: We watched the sea from the ship's deck.
deck.zh: 我們從船的甲板上看海。

decorate.en: We decorated the room for the party.
decorate.zh: 我們為派對布置了房間。

decrease.en: The number of birds has decreased.

deed.en: Helping others is a good deed.

definition.en: Look up the definition in the dictionary.

democracy.en: In a democracy, people choose their leaders.
democracy.zh: 在民主制度中，人民選出他們的領袖。

democratic.en: They live in a democratic country.
democratic.zh: 他們住在一個民主的國家。

deposit.en: She made a deposit at the bank.

designer.en: She is a famous fashion designer.
designer.zh: 她是個有名的服裝設計師。

desirable.en: A quiet home is desirable for studying.
desirable.zh: 安靜的家是讀書的理想環境。

desire.en: He has a strong desire to learn.

dessert.en: We had ice cream for dessert.

destroy.en: The fire destroyed the old house.
destroy.zh: 大火摧毀了那棟舊房子。

detect.en: Dogs can detect smells we cannot.
detect.zh: 狗能聞到我們聞不到的氣味。

determine.en: Hard work can determine your success.
determine.zh: 努力可以決定你的成功。

devil.en: In the story, the devil tricked the man.
devil.zh: 在故事裡，魔鬼欺騙了那個人。

dim.en: The light in the room was dim.

dime.en: A dime is worth ten cents.

dine.en: We dined at a nice restaurant.
dine.zh: 我們在一家很棒的餐廳用餐。

dinosaur.en: Dinosaurs lived millions of years ago.
dinosaur.zh: 恐龍生活在數百萬年前。

dip.en: She dipped the bread in the soup.

dirt.en: His shoes were covered in dirt.

discount.en: The store offers a ten percent discount.

dishonest.en: It is dishonest to lie to your friends.
dishonest.zh: 對朋友說謊是不誠實的。

disk-disc.en: She saved the file on a disk.

dive.en: He dived into the cool pool.

dizzy.en: I felt dizzy after spinning around.

dock.en: The boat is tied to the dock.

donkey.en: The donkey carried the heavy bags.

dose.en: Take one dose of the medicine each day.

doubtful.en: It is doubtful that he will come.

drag.en: He dragged the heavy box across the floor.

dragonfly.en: A dragonfly flew over the pond.

drain.en: The water drained out of the sink.

dramatic.en: There was a dramatic change in the weather.
dramatic.zh: 天氣出現了戲劇性的變化。

drip.en: Water dripped from the broken pipe.
drip.zh: 水從破掉的管子滴下來。

drown.en: Always swim where you can't drown.
drown.zh: 要在不會溺水的地方游泳。

drugstore.en: I bought medicine at the drugstore.

drunk.en: He never drives when he is drunk.

dumb.en: The shock left him dumb for a moment.
dumb.zh: 那衝擊讓他一時說不出話。

dump.en: Don't dump trash in the river.

dumpling.en: We eat dumplings during the festival.

dust.en: There is dust on the old books.

eager.en: The children are eager to play outside.

echo.en: Our voices echoed in the cave.
echo.zh: 我們的聲音在洞穴裡迴響。

edit.en: She edited the report before sending it.
edit.zh: 她在寄出前修改了報告。

editor.en: The editor checked the article for mistakes.
editor.zh: 編輯檢查文章有沒有錯誤。

educational.en: The museum trip was very educational.
educational.zh: 這趟博物館之旅很有教育意義。

efficient.en: She found an efficient way to work.
efficient.zh: 她找到了有效率的工作方法。

elbow.en: He hurt his elbow playing tennis.
elbow.zh: 他打網球時弄傷了手肘。

elderly.en: We should help the elderly cross the road.
elderly.zh: 我們應該幫助老人過馬路。

elect.en: The students elected a new class leader.
elect.zh: 學生們選出了新的班長。

election.en: The election will be held next month.

electricity.en: The storm cut off our electricity.
electricity.zh: 暴風雨切斷了我們的電力。

electronic.en: She bought a new electronic device.
electronic.zh: 她買了一個新的電子裝置。

element.en: Trust is an important element of friendship.
element.zh: 信任是友誼的重要元素。

elevator.en: Take the elevator to the fifth floor.

emergency.en: Call this number in an emergency.

emperor.en: The emperor ruled a large empire.
emperor.zh: 皇帝統治著一個大帝國。

enable.en: The new tool enables us to work faster.
enable.zh: 這個新工具讓我們工作得更快。

energetic.en: The puppy is lively and energetic.
energetic.zh: 這隻小狗活潑又有活力。

enjoyable.en: We had an enjoyable trip to the beach.
enjoyable.zh: 我們有一趟愉快的海灘之旅。

entry.en: The main entry is on the left.

envy.en: She felt envy when she saw the prize.
envy.zh: 看到那個獎品時她感到羨慕。

excellence.en: The school is known for its excellence.

exchange.en: We exchanged gifts at the party.
exchange.zh: 我們在派對上交換禮物。

exhibition.zh: 我們參觀了一場藝術展覽。

expectation.en: The result was beyond our expectation.
expectation.zh: 這個結果超出我們的預期。

experiment.en: We did a science experiment in class.
experiment.zh: 我們在課堂上做了科學實驗。

explode.en: The firework exploded in the sky.

explore.zh: 他們探索那個黑暗的洞穴。

export.en: The country exports a lot of fruit.
export.zh: 這個國家出口許多水果。

fade.en: The color of the shirt faded in the sun.
fade.zh: 襯衫的顏色在陽光下褪色了。

faint.en: She felt faint in the hot room.
faint.zh: 在悶熱的房間裡她覺得快暈倒。

fairy.en: The story is about a kind fairy.
fairy.zh: 這個故事是關於一位善良的仙女。

faith.en: She has great faith in her friends.
faith.zh: 她對朋友有很大的信心。

fake.en: The ring turned out to be fake.

familiar.en: His face looks familiar to me.

fancy.en: They ate at a fancy restaurant.
fancy.zh: 他們在一家高級餐廳吃飯。

fare.en: The bus fare went up this year.

farther.en: The store is farther than I thought.

fashionable.zh: 她總是穿著時髦的衣服。

fearful.en: The child was fearful of the big dog.
fearful.zh: 那個小孩很怕那隻大狗。

feather.en: A soft feather fell from the bird.
feather.zh: 一根柔軟的羽毛從鳥身上掉下來。

fence.en: A wooden fence surrounds the garden.

fighter.en: The boxer is a strong fighter.
fighter.zh: 這位拳擊手是個強壯的鬥士。

firework.en: We watched the fireworks on New Year.

fist.en: He held the coin tight in his fist.
fist.zh: 他把硬幣緊握在拳頭裡。

flame.en: The candle's flame danced in the wind.
flame.zh: 蠟燭的火焰在風中搖曳。

flash.en: A flash of lightning lit the sky.

flashlight.en: He used a flashlight in the dark.
flashlight.zh: 他在黑暗中使用手電筒。

flavor.en: This ice cream has a strawberry flavor.
flavor.zh: 這個冰淇淋是草莓口味。

flesh.en: The fruit has sweet, soft flesh.
flesh.zh: 這水果的果肉又甜又軟。

float.en: The leaf floated on the water.

flock.en: A flock of birds flew south.

flood.en: The heavy rain caused a flood.

flour.en: We need flour to make bread.
flour.zh: 我們需要麵粉來做麵包。

foggy.en: It was foggy on the mountain road.

fond.en: She is fond of her little brother.

forever.en: I will remember this day forever.

fortune.en: He made a fortune from his business.
fortune.zh: 他靠生意賺了一大筆財富。

frank.en: To be frank, I don't like the plan.
frank.zh: 老實說，我不喜歡這個計畫。
